title: Colours and clothes
explanation:
Colours and clothes

  • colours: red, blue, green, black, white, yellow, brown, grey
  • clothes: shirt, T-shirt, trousers, jeans, dress, skirt, jacket, coat, shoes, socks, hat
  • verbs: wear, put on, take off

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: She is wearing a red ____. | *dress | shoe | hat
I need new ____. My old ones have holes. | *socks | skirt | dress
He always wears a ____ in winter. | *coat | T-shirt | skirt
My favourite colour is ____. | *blue | jacket | shoe

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: He wears ____ to work every day. | shirt
She bought new ____ for the party. | shoes
It's cold — put on your ____. | jacket

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: I ____ my jacket when I go inside. | *take off | put on | wear
She is wearing a white ____. | *T-shirt | blue | sock
These ____ are too big for me. | *trousers | hat | red
He ____ a hat because it's sunny. | *wears | colour | skirt
